parsed.production_notes: The video exhibits classic signs of AI generation. The faces have an uncanny, overly smooth texture with minimal micro-expressions, and the lip-syncing is slightly imprecise. The backgrounds, while detailed, remain perfectly static without any natural subtle movements, and the characters' movements are restricted to slight, repetitive head bobs.

characters.appearance: Black woman in her 30s, medium build, dark complexion. She has short, curly black hair and clear facial features. No obvious distinguishing marks.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a solid green crew-neck t-shirt throughout the entire video.
characters.demeanor: Earnest, eager to learn, and enthusiastic.

characters.appearance: White woman in her 30s, slim build, fair complexion. She has shoulder-length, wavy brown hair. Her face is symmetrical with a soft appearance.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a dark blue top with a subtle v-neckline throughout the video.

scenes.setting: Two separate cozy living rooms, daytime, warm color palette.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is positioned in the center of the frame, looking directly at the camera. She is sitting in a cozy, well-lit living room. Visible behind her are a wooden bookshelf, a floor lamp emitting a warm glow, and a grey sofa draped with a yellow blanket. A framed piece of abstract art hangs on the wall. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting her facial features. She speaks with an earnest expression.

Character B faces the camera directly with a gentle smile. Her background consists of a living room setting with a sofa adorned with patterned throw pillows. A warm lamp illuminates the corner, and a framed picture is visible on the wall behind her. The lighting is even and soft, creating a welcoming atmosphere. She remains mostly still, listening attentively.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally into two equal halves. The top half features Character A in a green shirt sitting in a living room. The bottom half shows Character B in a blue shirt, also in a living room setting. Both women are framed from the chest up in a medium close-up, appearing to be on a video call. The overall color palette is warm, with earthy tones and soft lighting in both backgrounds.
scenes.audio_transcript:

Character A says: They're wrong.
Character A says: In every meeting, when I don't understand something, I say this.
Character A says: Can you repeat that?
